title: Kreta - Jason Hotel Apartments

**Stosunek ceny do jakości:** Trudno ocenić (brak ocen na Booking.com).

placeholders: Brak danych z powodu błędu lub CAPTCHA.

enrichments.Overall Impression: The page is blocked by CAPTCHA, so there is no reliable room, amenity, or review evidence. Treat this listing as unverified rather than judging it from the fallback notes alone.
enrichments.Location & Beach: The only location hint in the model is a fallback note pointing to Rethymno Beach at roughly 0.8 km, but the live page itself could not be read. Keep that distance as provisional only.
enrichments.Room Fit: No room details were available, so occupancy, layout, and bathroom setup cannot be confirmed. The safest assumption is that the room fit is unknown until the page is accessible.
enrichments.Amenities & Comfort: The JSON contains no usable amenity list, and the source does not expose any facilities because of the block. Comfort level is therefore unknown.
enrichments.Laundry Verdict: The model says there is no washer or laundry service, but that rests on the blocked extraction and should be treated cautiously. Do not assume laundry support without a clean page read.
enrichments.Guest Sentiment: There are no visible reviews or rating data, so guest sentiment cannot be inferred. This listing should be treated as a data gap.
enrichments.Tradeoffs: The main tradeoff is simple: almost all decision-making data is missing because the page is blocked. That means any booking judgment here would be speculative.
enrichments.Best For: Only for shoppers willing to verify details manually after the block clears. It is not a confident pick for anyone who needs firm evidence up front.
